summary_en: 日比谷設 authorized a share buyback. Direct return of capital and a signal management views shares as undervalued.
summary_jp: 日比谷設が自己株式取得を決議。資本還元と株価評価のシグナル。

summary_en: 日比谷設 announced a material dividend change (special dividend). Reframes the return-of-capital baseline.
summary_jp: 日比谷設が配当方針変更を開示（特別配当）。資本還元基準が刷新。
